content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(authMiddleware)
C: backcompat ∧ security ∧ minimal_diff
H: boundary_expiry_check
P: if(cmp.expMs,">",nowMs-graceMs) → return(next)
V: assert(status,"401") ∧ assert(req.userId,exists) ∧ cmp(expMs,">",nowMs-graceMs)
R: ! timer_skew ∧ ! token_mismanagement
A: allow_grace_period_for_expired_token

[AUDIT]
Fix authMiddleware, preserve backcompat, security, and verify with assert(status,"401").

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(authMiddleware)
C: backward compatibility ∧ security
H: handles clock skew for token expiration
P: check if expMs <= nowMs + 30000
V: graceful handling of expiring tokens
R: ! 401 loop on boundary cases
A: Add a grace period check for token expiration.

[AUDIT]
Fix authMiddleware, preserve backward compatibility, security, and verify with graceful handling of expiring tokens.

structured_data.h: handles clock skew for token expiration
a: Add a grace period check for token expiration.
